title: senecio sonnei
intro: Senecio sonnei, also known as Sonnei ragwort, is a plant species native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio sonnei include reducing inflammation, relieving muscle spasms, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, typically dried and made into a powder or taken as a liquid extract.
